cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out how many penguins are more than 5 years old and weigh more than 12 kg. First, I need to look at the data provided. There are four penguins: Louis, Bernard, Vincent, and Gwen. Let me list out their details: Louis: age 7, weight 11 kg Bernard: age 5, weight 13 kg Vincent: age 9, weight 11 kg Gwen: age 8, weight 15 kg The question is asking for penguins that are both more than 5 years old AND weigh more than 12 kg. So I need to check each penguin against both conditions. Starting with Louis. His age is 7, which is more than 5. His weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12 kg. So he doesn't meet the weight requirement. So Louis doesn't count. Next, Bernard. His age is exactly 5. The condition is "more than 5," so 5 doesn't qualify. Even though his weight is 13 kg (which is more than 12), since his age isn't over 5, he doesn't meet both conditions. So Bernard is out. Then Vincent. Age is 9, which is more than 5. Weight is 11 kg, again less than 12. So he's out for the same reason as Louis. Lastly, Gwen. Age is 8, which is more than 5. Weight is 15 kg, which is more than 12.
